meaning: n.帽子,军帽,(瓶)帽,(笔)帽;vt.戴帽子,盖在...顶上;carrierless amplitude and phase,相幅载波
examples: He often wore a baseball cap.
She screwed the cap back on the jar.
She tucked her hair (up) under her cap.
We need to have some realism, the important thing is that we have a cap.
It was already the smallest in terms of market-cap of the big Wall Street banks.
